description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PlatformIO CI/CD that runs on pull requests, pushes to specific branches, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has multiple jobs for building and deploying code on various platforms, including Linux, Windows, and macOS, using PlatformIO and Python 3.9.13. Each job caches pip and PlatformIO dependencies, sets up Python, installs PlatformIO, and runs PlatformIO CI for specific boards.
